message:
feat: rename crate to `tru` and publish to crates.io

- Rename package from `toon_rust` to `tru` since `toon-rust` was already
  taken on crates.io by a different project (Cargo normalizes _ to -)
- Add version specifier to asupersync dependency (required for crates.io)
- Exclude storage.sqlite3 from published package
- Update all `toon_rust::` references to `tru::` across src, tests, and benchmarks
- Update library usage examples in README.md
- Update WASM doc comment JS import path
- Update docs.rs URL to point to new crate name
- Bump version to 0.1.3

Published as: https://crates.io/crates/tru

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,7 +123,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode",
@@ -139,6 +139,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde_json",
  "sha1",
  "slab",
+ "smallvec",
  "socket2",
  "tempfile",
  "thiserror",

 checksum = "1f3ccbac311fea05f86f61904b462b55fb3df8837a366dfc601a0161d0532f20"

-name = "toon_rust"
-version = "0.1.2"

-]
-
 [[package]]
 name = "tracing"
 version = "0.1.44"
@@ -2648,6 +2621,34 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing-serde",
 ]

+version = "0.1.2"
+dependencies = [

+ "serde_json",
+ "tempfile",

@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 [package]
-name = "toon_rust"
-version = "0.1.2"
+name = "tru"
+version = "0.1.3"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "TOON reference implementation in Rust (JSON <-> TOON)"
 license = "MIT"
 readme = "README.md"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust"
-documentation = "https://docs.rs/toon_rust"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/tru"
 keywords = ["cli", "json", "serialization", "llm", "encoding"]
 categories = ["command-line-utilities", "encoding"]
 exclude = [
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ exclude = [
     "PROPOSED_ARCHITECTURE.md",
     "tests/golden_outputs/",
     "toon_illustration.webp",
+    "storage.sqlite3",
 ]
 
 [[bin]]
@@ -48,7 +49,7 @@ tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.22", features = ["env-filter", "fmt", "jso
 chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
 
 # Async streaming (optional)
-asupersync = { path = "../asupersync", optional = true }
+asupersync = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../asupersync", optional = true }
 
 # WebAssembly (optional)
 wasm-bindgen = { version = "0.2", optional = true }
